name: boundary
explanation: HashiCorp Boundary's controller exposes Prometheus metrics on `/metrics` and a health endpoint on `/health`, both on the controller listener (default port 9203). The check inherits `OpenMetricsBaseCheckV2` and the only auxiliary call is an unauthenticated GET on `/health`. Both paths are universal and unauthenticated by default, so a generic OpenMetrics port-scan that targets 9203 covers it. Pattern A, with the health-endpoint requirement being a peer of the metrics URL on the same port. The Boundary controller's metrics endpoint is publicly documented as fixed at the controller API listener.
notes: Two required URL fields but they live on the same host:port and have fixed paths, so discovery still reduces to a single port probe.
